test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bitmap_contains_32 ( bm AggregateFunction(groupBitmap, UInt32) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bitmap_contains_32 SELECT groupBitmapState(toUInt32(number)) FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: WITH (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_contains_32) AS bm SELECT countIf(bitmapContains(bm, toUInt64(number % 1000000))) FROM numbers(10000000) FORMAT Null
WITH (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_contains_32) AS bm SELECT countIf(bitmapContains(bm, toUInt64(4294967296 + number % 1000000))) FROM numbers(10000000) FORMAT Null
